SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractCell
Abstract base class representing a Cell on the 2D grid.
AirCell
Concrete implementation of AbstractCell representing an AIR cell.
BuildingCell
Concrete implementation of AbstractCell representing a solid BUILDING cell.
CellController
Controller mediating communication between AbstractCell model and JavaFX CellPresentation view.
CellView
JavaFX component rendering a Cell's state visually.
CLIController
Controller mediating simulation data model updates specifically for the CommandLineInterface view.
CommandLineInterface
Text-based interactive command-line interface view.
CyBreathe
CyBreathe launcher.
FactoryCell
Concrete implementation of AbstractCell representing a FACTORY cell.
Grid
Abstraction model for the 2D grid, managing cells and neighbors.
GridController
Controller coordinating all grid CellControl elements for JavaFX GUI.
GridView
JavaFX grid panel containing CellPresentations.
GUIApplication
Main graphical user interface application wrapper for JavaFX presentation window.
Simulation
Model layer representing the global state of the simulation.
SimulationController
Controller mediating communication between SimulationAbstraction model and JavaFX SimulationPresentation view.
SimulationParameters
Global configuration parameters for the 2D Cellular Pollution Simulation.
SimulationView
JavaFX Dashboard presentation layer.
VegetationCell
Concrete implementation of AbstractCell representing a Vegetation cell.
WindDirection
Enumeration representing wind directions and their corresponding 2D grid offset vectors.
